meaning: n.(尤指载客的脚踏)三轮车
examples: He has become the most popular pedicab driver in Kaifeng.
In our alley alone, there are three pedicab riders.
This is my mother picking us up from the wharf, on pedicab.
But Friedl Schroeder who runs the BugBugs pedicab company said pedicabs needed licensing, not banning.
The pedicab drivers, who still tout for business outside hotels with fleets of Mercedes, occupy a similar niche market in Asian capitals today.
